title: Editing quality profiles | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Editing a custom quality profile

## [Activating rules in a quality profile](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#activating-rules-in-quality-profile "Activating rules in a quality profile")

You can activate rules in any custom quality profile.

### [Activating a single rule](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#activating-a-single-rule "Activating a single rule")

When you activate a single rule, you can customize the rule configurable parameters (if any) in the quality profile.

To activate a single rule in a custom quality profile (from the quality profile's page):

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization") and go to **Quality Profiles**.

2. Locate the quality profile's row and display the list of available rules as follows:

  - Either select the three-dot button in the far right of the row, and select **Activate more rules** in the menu.
  - Or select the profile and, in the profile page, select the **Activate more** button at the bottom of the **Rule breakdown** section.

3. To activate a single rule, select **Activate** at the far right of the rule row. The **Activate in Quality Profile** dialog opens.

4. If necessary, customize the rule parameters.

5. Select **Activate**.

![](https://docs.sonarsource.com/Base64-Image-Removed)

![](https://assets-eu-01.kc-usercontent.com:443/b1eeb429-d9e0-0100-be87-468f6802040a/cbeffe1b-2b2f-4f34-af3e-074311d79c42/sonarqube-cloud-activate-rule-in-quality-profile_Cs0088.png?w=1366&h=669&auto=format&fit=crop)

To activate a single rule in a custom quality profile (from the rule's page):

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization").

2. Go to **Rules** and retrieve the rule.

3. In the rule page, navigate to the bottom to the **Quality Profiles** section.

4. In front of **Quality Profiles**, select **Activate**. The **Activate rule in Quality Profile** dialog opens.

5. In **Quality Profile**, select the quality profile. Note that if the rule is active in all profiles except one, this profile will be automatically selected in the dialog.

6. Customize the rule parameters if applicable and necessary.

7. Select **Activate**.

### [Activating all inactive rules](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#activating-all-inactive-rules "Activating all inactive rules")

To activate all inactive rules in a custom quality profile:

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization").

2. Go to **Quality Profiles** and retrieve the quality profile.

3. At the bottom of the **Rule breakdown** section, select **Activate more**. The list of inactive rules is displayed.

4. In the top tool bar, select **Bulk Change > Activate in <your profile>**. A confirmation dialog opens.

5. Confirm.

### [Activating rules from a profile comparison](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#activating-rules-from-a-profile-comparison "Activating rules from a profile comparison")

When you compare two profiles, you can activate a rule from the comparison results. See [Comparing quality profiles](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/viewing-quality-profiles/ "Comparing quality profiles").

## [Deactivating rules in a quality profile](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#deactivating-rules-in-a-quality-profile "Deactivating rules in a quality profile")

You can deactivate rules in any custom quality profile.

To deactivate rules in a custom quality profile (from the quality profile's page):

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization").

2. Go to **Quality Profiles** and retrieve the quality profile.

3. In the **Inheritance** section, select the **x active rules** hyperlink. The list of active rules displayed.

4. To deactivate a single rule, select **Deactivate** at the far right of the rule row.

5. To deactivate all active rules, select **Bulk Change > Deactivate in <your profile>** in the top tool bar.

To deactivate a single rule in a custom quality profile (from the rule's page):

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization").

2. Go to **Rules** and retrieve the rule.

3. In the rule page, navigate to the bottom to the **Quality Profiles** section.

4. In front of the custom quality profile, select **Deactivate**.

## [Customizing a rule's parameters in a quality profile](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#customizing-rule-parameters "Customizing a rule's parameters in a quality profile")

In a custom quality profile, you can customize the rule's configurable parameters (if any). If the quality profile inherits from a parent profile, the rule is considered *overridden*.

You can perform this operation during the rule activation in the quality profile or later as explained below:

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization").

2. Go to **Rules** and retrieve the rule.

3. In the rule page, navigate to the bottom to the **Quality Profiles** section.

4. In front of the custom quality profile, select **Change**. The Change details of quality profile dialog opens.

5. Change the parameter value(s).

6. Select **Save**.

## [Renaming a quality profile](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#renaming-a-quality-profile "Renaming a quality profile")

You can rename any custom quality profile.

To rename a quality profile:

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization").

2. Go to **Quality Profiles** and retrieve the quality profile.

3. Select the three-dot button.

4. Select **Rename**. the **Rename Profile** dialog opens.

5. Enter the new name and select **Rename**.

## [Changing the parent of a quality profile](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/editing-a-custom-quality-profile/#changing-parent-of-quality-profile "Changing the parent of a quality profile")

You can change or remove the existing parent, or you can add a parent to a custom quality profile. To do so:

1. [Retrieve your organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started/viewing-organizations/ "Retrieve your organization").

2. Go to **Quality Profiles** and retrieve the quality profile.

3. In the **Inheritance** section of the quality profile, select **Change parent**. The **Change Parent** dialog opens.

4. In the dialog, select the new parent or **None** to remove the inheritance.

5. Select **Change**.
